note: ContractSurface accepts code in {0,1} unconditionally; fixture-class (clean vs issues) not mapped to expected exit.
FailingTestExitsNonZero checks exit only; stdout content (TestA name, non-empty) never asserted.
DetectsFileWrite accepts any event on the channel; no causal link to the write (no pre-drain or path check).
Trailing-data tolerance tests only assert doc.Version; len(Runs) and driver name not checked.
RunsOnceAndExitsOnStdinEOF asserts exit=0 but does not verify the child command ran.
Roundtrip is a sampling test: fp2, DataHash, GeneratedAt not asserted; DeepEqual would close the gap.
Determinism asserts byte-equality but not len(a)>0; empty-output regression would pass.
TallyPipeline LLM branch uses strings.Contains for digits/labels; row layout (rank/count) not pinned.
Color tests assert escape substring presence anywhere; not anchored to the labeled item.
cmd/fo/state_test.go and pure watch tests omit t.Parallel(); spot-checked TestRunWatch_* + state tests.
